potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow a user to create a new account.
The system shall validate the registration of a new user.
The system shall allow a user to book a ticket, which will be confirmed.
The system shall log out the user after they complete any action.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the registration is not valid, it ends there.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall notify the user if their registration is invalid and prevent them from logging in.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow a user to create a new account.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that creating an account is allowed; it only mentions starting by either creating a new account or logging in.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall validate the registration of a new user.
hallucinations.reason: The source text states validation happens if the registration is successful, but does not explicitly state that validation occurs for all registrations.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow the user to log in upon successful registration.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall validate the registration of a new user.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are closely related and could be considered duplicates.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: After logging in, the person can choose what they want to do.
ambiguities.reason: The source text does not specify that this is an option after logging in; it only states actions a user can take after logging in.
